grammatical: Hij stopte omdat Jan de trein zag vertrekken.
ungrammatical: Hij stopte omdat Jan de trein vertrekken zag.
source: constructed for this dataset; no literary precedent for omdat-clause CSD examples exists in the formal linguistics literature
notes: Green word order (vertrekken zag) is attested in Dutch verb clusters and may be accepted by some speakers. Human validation required.

grammatical: Hij stopte omdat Jan de trein zag vertrekken.
ungrammatical: Hij stopte omdat de trein Jan zag vertrekken.
source: constructed for this dataset; no literary precedent for omdat-clause CSD examples exists in the formal linguistics literature
notes: Ungrammaticality driven by selectional restriction: de trein (inanimate) cannot be subject of zag. Clean for alignment analysis.

grammatical: Hij stopte omdat Jan de trein zag vertrekken.
ungrammatical: Hij stopte omdat de trein Jan vertrekken zag.
source: constructed for this dataset; no literary precedent for omdat-clause CSD examples exists in the formal linguistics literature
notes: Alignment restored by double reversal; selectional restriction still violated (de trein as subject of zag). Critical test for alignment vs. order tracking. Human validation required.
